languages.text: "Советники! Каждое слово, сказанное в поддержку Ювенны, увеличит ваши шансы на победу!"

traits.locale_text: [draft]не молчите же вы, это ваш шанс оказаться на правильной стороне истории!

languages.text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"
languages.original_text: "Советники! Каждое слово, сказанное в поддержку Ювенны, увеличит ваши шансы на победу!"

languages.text: “诸位议员！每一句支持尤文娜的话都会让你们的胜算增加一分！”
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: “诸位议员！每一句支持尤文娜的话都会让你们的胜算增加一分！”

languages.text: « Membres du conseil ! Chaque mot prononcé en soutien de Juvenna augmentera vos chances de victoire ! »
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: « Membres du conseil ! Chaque mot prononcé en soutien de Juvenna augmentera vos chances de victoire ! »

languages.text: «¡Miembros del consejo! ¡Cada palabra en apoyo a Juvenna aumenta nuestras probabilidades de ganar!».
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Miembros del consejo! ¡Cada palabra en apoyo a Juvenna aumenta nuestras probabilidades de ganar!».

languages.text: "Konsey üyeleri! Juvenna'ya destek olarak ağzınızdan çıkacak söz, zafer şansınızı artıracaktır!"
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: "Konsey üyeleri! Juvenna'ya destek olarak ağzınızdan çıkacak söz, zafer şansınızı artıracaktır!"

languages.text: "Mitglieder des Rates! Jedes Wort zu Juvennas Unterstützung wird Eure Chancen auf den Sieg erhöhen!"
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: "Mitglieder des Rates! Jedes Wort zu Juvennas Unterstützung wird Eure Chancen auf den Sieg erhöhen!"

languages.text: 「評議員のみなさん！ジュベナを支持するすべての言葉は、勝利への道を開きます！」
languages.original_text: "Members of the council! Every word spoken in support of Juvenna will increase your chances of victory!"

traits.locale_text: 「評議員のみなさん！ジュベナを支持するすべての言葉は、勝利への道を開きます！」
